sources.label: Infold Games official website
sources.notes: Mission, values, game portfolio, and career categories.

sources.label: Infinity Nikki official website
sources.notes: Official game navigation and current content pillars: worlds, outfits, features, guides, news/events.

studio_signals.portfolio_response: Lead with authored worlds, strong visual taste, and personal art direction rather than only tool lists.
Frame environments as destinations with mood, traversal, materials, and charm hooks.
Show Sakura Dream, Space Cathedral, Baroque Castle, and Bioluminescent Grotto as distinct fantasy concepts.
Make shaders, Niagara, PCG, Geometry Nodes, retopology, stats, and validation visible as production proof.
Keep the portfolio git-driven, source-readable, and ready for frequent Unreal render/package drops.

infinity_nikki_design_takeaways: Open-world styling fantasy means environments should support wonder, collection, gentle traversal, and photo-friendly composition.
Official site content buckets such as worlds, outfits, features, guides, news, and events suggest a portfolio structure with worlds first and technical proof as guided supporting pages.
The portfolio should avoid using official game assets; the correct move is inspired alignment through Brennan-owned renders, shader proofs, and editorial presentation.
next_website_actions: Use portfolio_package.json as the Unreal-to-web ingestion point.
Promote hero renders and shader/Niagara breakdowns into generated/assets/unreal.
Generate Melodia breakdown cards from package metadata and render captions.
Keep application-hub.html as the primary Wix iframe route.
